title: Uruguayan Fried Cheese
description: A simple dish from Uruguay, where cheese is pan-fried to perfection. This recipe is a classic comfort food that can be enjoyed for breakfast, lunch, or dinner.
instructions: 1. Cut the Cheddar cheese into 1-inch cubes.
2. In a shallow dish, mix together flour, beaten egg, and milk to create a batter.
3. Dip each cheese cube into the batter, coating all sides evenly.
4. Heat about 1/2 inch of oil in a large pan over medium heat.
5. Fry the battered cheese cubes until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes per side.
6. Remove the fried cheese from the oil with a slotted spoon and place on a paper towel-lined plate.
7. Sprinkle with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Serve the Uruguayan fried cheese hot.
